summary: Iteration 6 - All tests passed. Verified all 5 requested changes: 1) Currency/language modals use dynamic theme colors (C.bg, C.text) instead of hardcoded LinearGradient, 2) AI chat system message uses 'femeie' not 'mamă' by default, 3) Terms/Privacy updated to SoldOut Digital LTD + support@mommanager.co.uk, 4) LANGUAGES array includes all 12 languages including pl, ru, uk, ar, pt, 5) Skincare section is a card that opens modal with vertical skin type selectors

issues: Minor: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings in console - should use 'boxShadow' (same as iteration 5)
